heroSubtext:
You have always known you were built for more. Let's make sure your mindset knows it too.

I help driven women strengthen their inner narratives so they can show up with greater confidence, influence and impact.
ctaHeading: You've felt lost now for long enough
ctaBody:
Do you 'have it all' on paper, but deep down this isn't lighting you up?

Are you ignoring the quiet nag that you're meant for more?

Does your spark feel dimmed?

I'm here to tell you that it's still there, inside you.

**You just need to look within, and take that first step.**
aboutBody:
Hi, I'm Shanila — a coach, a facilitator with ten years of experience helping people create meaningful and lasting change in both their personal and professional lives. Over the years, I've had the privilege of supporting them to break through barriers, reinvent their beliefs, and lead life with intentions and clarity to be the best version of themselves.

I had the opportunity to be trained and mentored by internationally acclaimed coach (Global Guru) Vikram Dhar, whose guidance gave me a global perspective and equipped me with proven methodologies that I weave into the coaching practice.
feelLikeYouTagline: That's what clarity coaching can give you.
feelLikeYouQuestions:
What if you could rewrite your story?
To feel fired up, instead of fed up, at the start of the day?
To remember what YOU felt like, before work, family, and responsibilities took over?
To get back in the driver's seat of your life, clear and confident about the road ahead?
servicesSubtext: With over ten years' of experience helping individuals break through barriers in work and at home, let me take that first step with you.

services.title: Mindset Coaching
services.description: My signature 12-week coaching programme for women ready to get clear on their goals, values, decision-making, and life's direction.

services.title: Career Coaching
services.description: The career edition of my mindset coaching. Whether you're a graduate, considering a career change, or feeling unsatisfied at work, you'll get clear and confident on your career path.

services.title: Numerology
services.description: Need answers now? My 1-hour Numerology session will help you glean crucial insight into your life path and relationships, giving you the tools and confidence to take action today.

bottomCTAText: Not sure what service is right for you? Book your free Discovery Call, and we'll find the right fit.
